title: Smallest String With A Given Numeric Value
titleCn: 具有给定数值的最小字符串

testcases.input: n = 3, k = 27 Output: "aay" Explanation: The numeric value of the string is 1 + 1 + 25 = 27, and it is the smallest string with such a value and length equal to 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: "aay" Explanation: The numeric value of the string is 1 + 1 + 25 = 27, and it is the smallest string with such a value and length equal to 3.
